rag_rules: Repair invalid AGREE expressions by resolving unresolved identifiers or removing clauses with type errors, without modifying AADL architecture.
generic_rules: Only reference visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Use 'assign' in implementation annexes for output bindings; never use guarantees for implementation-level paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must resolve to a known type; use 'eq' to declare helpers with explicit types if needed.
Component type annexes must not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only names.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix type errors—fix or delete the invalid clause instead.
irrelevant_topics: assume/guarantee placement in component types vs implementations
AADL structural extraction beyond feature visibility
